<?php namespace Twilio\Rest; use Twilio\Rest\Numbers\V2; class Numbers extends NumbersBase { /** * @deprecated Use v2->regulatoryCompliance instead. */ protected function getRegulatoryCompliance(): \Twilio\Rest\Numbers\V2\RegulatoryComplianceList { echo "regulatoryCompliance is deprecated. Use v2->regulatoryCompliance instead."; return $this->v2->regulatoryCompliance; } }
